title: Share Retry-After provider handling
goal: Extend provider rate-limit handling beyond OpenAI by sharing Retry-After parsing and using it for Anthropic and OpenRouter/OpenAI-compatible HTTP 429 responses.
completionConditions: Shared provider Retry-After parser is reused instead of duplicating OpenAI-only parsing.
Anthropic HTTP 429 includes retry-after seconds in retryable error text when header is present.
OpenRouter/OpenAI-compatible HTTP 429 includes retry-after seconds and is classified retryable.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Second issue #27 implementation slice. Keep small: no adaptive limiter yet, only parse/format/classify Retry-After for existing retry loops.
